---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill, agent, or governance improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Why is the current behavior insufficient?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is this one better?

## Scope

- [ ] This is a generic governance improvement (not project-specific)
- [ ] This does not require changes to core governance logic
- [ ] This can be implemented in < 200 lines

## Additional Context

Any examples, mockups, or references that help explain the request.
